data.title: African Gold Investors Back Montage Takeover With Near-Unanimous Vote
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

African Gold Ltd. ( (AU:A1G) ) just unveiled an announcement.

African Gold shareholders and optionholders have overwhelmingly approved schemes of arrangement under which TSX-listed Montage Gold Corp will acquire 100% of African Gold’s shares and related options. The Share Scheme resolution passed with 99.99% of votes cast in favour and support from 96.23% of voting shareholders, satisfying a key remaining condition in the Scheme Implementation Deed and significantly advancing the takeover process, which is expected to reshape African Gold’s ownership structure and integration into Montage’s portfolio.

The decisive backing from both equity and option investors underscores strong support for the transaction terms and the strategic rationale behind combining the two gold businesses. With statutory approval thresholds met, the deal now hinges on remaining court and regulatory steps, signaling likely completion and potential consolidation benefits for stakeholders across both companies and the regional gold sector.

More about African Gold Ltd.

African Gold Ltd is an Australian-listed gold exploration and development company focused on advancing gold assets, with its shares traded on the ASX under the ticker A1G. The company operates within the broader precious metals sector, positioning itself as a target for strategic consolidation in the West African gold industry.

YTD Price Performance: 51.52%

Average Trading Volume: 2,186,140

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$569.4M

data.title: AF Legal Director Peter Johns Increases Indirect Shareholding Via Westferry Fund
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

AF Legal Group Limited ( (AU:AFL) ) has issued an update.

AF Legal Group disclosed a change in director Peter Johns’ indirect holdings, after an on-market purchase of 59,908 fully paid ordinary shares at $0.16 each through Westferry Operations Pty Ltd as trustee for The Westferry Fund. Following this transaction, Johns’ indirect interest now comprises 5,559,908 shares in The Westferry Fund and an unchanged 10,000,000 shares in the Westferry Legal Services Fund, signalling a modest increase in his economic exposure to the company without any changes to contractual interests.

The update underscores the continued alignment of the director’s interests with AF Legal Group’s equity performance, as Johns remains both a director and shareholder of Westferry Operations Pty Ltd and a beneficiary of the associated funds. No changes were reported in his interests in contracts, suggesting that the impact is confined to equity holdings rather than broader financing or commercial arrangements, and may be viewed by stakeholders as a routine but supportive vote of confidence in the company’s prospects.

More about AF Legal Group Limited

AF Legal Group Ltd is an Australian-listed company operating in the legal services sector. The firm is involved in providing legal services and appears to have a focus on matters that attract investment via dedicated legal services funds, indicating an investor-backed, fund-related structure around its operations.

Teaminvest Private Group Ltd ( (AU:TIP) ) has provided an update.

Teaminvest Private Group Ltd has reported a change in the relevant interests of director Howard Harry Coleman, who holds shares both directly and through entities he controls, including Colfam Super Fund, Colfam Trust and Natmich Pty Ltd. The company disclosed that on 13 April 2026, Colfam Super Fund acquired 10,000 fully paid ordinary shares via an on-market trade at $1.2855 per share, modestly increasing Coleman’s indirect stake and signalling continued insider confidence in the stock.

Following the transaction, Coleman’s direct holding remains unchanged, while his indirect holdings through Colfam Super Fund have risen to 368,601 shares, with no disposals recorded across any of his related entities. This incremental purchase slightly lifts overall director ownership, which is often watched by investors as an indicator of management’s outlook and alignment with shareholder interests.

More about Teaminvest Private Group Ltd

Teaminvest Private Group Ltd is an Australian-listed company, though this notice provides no detail on its specific industry, products or services. The filing focuses solely on director shareholdings and does not elaborate on the group’s operational activities or market positioning.

Coforge Limited ( (IN:COFORGE) ) has issued an update.

Coforge has secured all required statutory and regulatory approvals across multiple jurisdictions for its acquisition of Encora, clearing the way to close the transaction and create a combined AI-native technology services firm with a run-rate revenue of about $2.5 billion. The deal significantly scales Coforge’s core in data, AI-led engineering, and cloud services, with integration planning on schedule, senior leadership retention secured, and joint commercial teams ready to launch collaborative operations.

The company is advancing a cost-optimization program focused on General and Administrative functions, aiming for a 20%–25% reduction in G&A expenses for the combined entity, which underpins its confidence in meeting margin guidance. Management expects the merged firm to operate as a more powerful AI-led platform for accelerated growth, positioning Coforge to strengthen its competitive standing and deliver earlier-than-planned value to shareholders through realized synergies and enhanced operating efficiency.

An update from Far Northern Resources Limited ( (AU:FNR) ) is now available.

Far Northern Resources Limited has lodged an application with the ASX for quotation of 31,195,309 ordinary fully paid shares under its existing FNR code. The securities, which were issued on 12 April 2024 and are no longer subject to escrow restrictions, will now be eligible for trading, modestly increasing the company’s freely tradable share base and potentially improving market liquidity.

The application, filed as a new announcement dated 13 April 2026, reflects a routine step in transitioning previously restricted securities to quoted status on the exchange. This move may broaden participation by investors in Far Northern Resources’ stock and can support more efficient price discovery as the enlarged pool of quoted shares comes onto the market.

Auroch Minerals Ltd. ( (AU:OR3) ) has issued an update.

Ore Resources Ltd. has convened a General Meeting of shareholders to be held on 13 May 2026 in West Perth, Western Australia, with all resolutions to be decided by poll. The company is shifting to primarily electronic distribution of meeting materials, directing investors to its website and the ASX platform to access the Notice of Meeting and manage communication preferences.

Shareholders are being encouraged to participate either in person or via proxy, with detailed options provided for online, mobile, email, fax, post, or in-person lodgement of votes ahead of the meeting deadline. The company is also inviting shareholders to submit questions in advance, signalling an emphasis on engagement and orderly governance as it prepares for key decisions requiring investor approval.

More about Auroch Minerals Ltd.

Ore Resources Ltd. (ASX: OR3) is an Australian-listed resources company focused on mineral exploration and development, operating within the broader mining and natural resources sector. data.title: Bayhorse Silver Signs European IR Deal and Grants 400,000 Stock Options
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Bayhorse Silver ( (TSE:BHS) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Bayhorse Silver has signed a six-month marketing and investor relations agreement with Germany-based M & M Consult UG to boost its visibility among German-speaking investors through online and mining-focused media channels in Europe. The engagement underscores Bayhorse’s effort to broaden its shareholder base outside Canada, with MMC restricted from providing investor relations services domestically.

The company has also granted 400,000 stock options to officers, directors and consultants at an exercise price of $0.10 per share for five years, including 100,000 options tied to the MMC mandate that will vest over 12 months. The options, which largely vest immediately for other recipients, align management and consultant incentives with shareholder interests and remain subject to Bayhorse’s stock option plan and TSX Venture Exchange approval.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:BHS) stock is a Buy with a C$0.21 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bayhorse Silver stock, see the TSE:BHS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BHS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BHS is a Neutral.

The score is primarily weighed down by weak financial performance (no revenue, continued losses, negative free cash flow, and negative equity indicating funding risk). Technical indicators also show a soft near-term trend (below short-term moving averages and negative MACD). Valuation signals are limited due to negative earnings and no stated dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on BHS stock, click here.

More about Bayhorse Silver

Bayhorse Silver Inc. is a North American silver exploration and production company with a 100% interest in the historic Bayhorse Silver Mine in Oregon and the Pegasus Project in Idaho. The Bayhorse Mine is a low-impact operation using ore-sorting technology and a nearby flotation mill, supported by an offtake agreement with Ocean Partners UK and a management team experienced in mine exploration and development.

data.title: Tribeca Global Natural Resources Posts Indicative Mid-Month NTA Update
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Tribeca Global Natural Resources Ltd. ( (AU:TGF) ) is now available.

Tribeca Global Natural Resources Limited has released an estimated net tangible asset backing per ordinary share as at 10 April 2026, reporting a pre-tax NTA of $3.55 and a post-tax NTA of $3.16 based on 73,693,826 shares on issue. The company stressed that these figures are indicative, unaudited and largely reflect the performance of its listed equity holdings, with private credit and other unlisted assets to be fully incorporated only in the official month-end NTA statement, meaning investors should treat the weekly NTA as a high-level guide rather than a complete measure of portfolio performance.

The reliance on estimated equity valuations and the exclusion of updated metrics for private credit and unlisted positions underline the challenges of valuing complex natural resources portfolios on a weekly cycle. For shareholders, the update provides a timely snapshot of asset backing but also reinforces the need to monitor the more comprehensive monthly NTA disclosures for a clearer picture of Tribeca Global Natural Resources’ underlying performance and risk profile.

More about Tribeca Global Natural Resources Ltd.

Tribeca Global Natural Resources Limited is an ASX-listed investment company focused on global natural resources, offering investors exposure to a portfolio spanning listed equities, private credit and other unlisted assets in the resources sector. The fund is managed by Tribeca Global Resources Pty Ltd, part of Tribeca Investment Partners, and targets diversified returns from commodities and resource-related investments.

Average Trading Volume: 221,130

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy
